creator: spe@phear.org
text:
*** /usr/ports/net/freevrrpd/Makefile	Sat Oct  4 12:19:15 2014
--- /home/spe/Makefile	Tue Mar 24 13:23:54 2015
***************
*** 5,15 ****
  PORTVERSION=	1.1
  PORTREVISION=	1
  CATEGORIES=	net
- MASTER_SITES=	http://opensource.kewego.com/freevrrpd/
- DISTFILES=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}${EXTRACT_SUFX}:DEFAULT,freebsd
  
! MAINTAINER=	spe@phear.org
! COMMENT=	This a VRRP RFC2338 Compliant implementation under FreeBSD
  
  MAKE_ENV=	PTHREAD_CFLAGS="${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}" \
  		PTHREAD_LIBS="${PTHREAD_LIBS}"
--- 5,18 ----
  PORTVERSION=	1.1
  PORTREVISION=	1
  CATEGORIES=	net
  
! USE_GITHUB=	yes
! GH_ACCOUNT=	gvnn3
! GH_PROJECT=	FreeVRRPd
! DISTVERSIONPREFIX=	v
! 
! MAINTAINER=	gnn@freebsd.org
! COMMENT=	RFC 2338 compliant VRRP implementation
  
  MAKE_ENV=	PTHREAD_CFLAGS="${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}" \
  		PTHREAD_LIBS="${PTHREAD_LIBS}"
